developerPanel.title: Developer Mode
developerPanel.description: Centralize experimental tools, debug events, environment snapshots, and rendering verification.

debugEvents.title: Debug Events
debugEvents.description: Show recent chat/debug events while keeping console output intact.
debugEvents.detailEmpty: Select an event to inspect its full JSON payload and metadata.
debugEvents.empty: No debug events yet. Turn on developer mode and start a chat, translation, or web search to inspect the debug stream here.

snapshot.title: Environment Snapshot
snapshot.description: Reuse the content-script injection snapshot from Site Permissions for developer diagnostics.

rendering.title: Rendering Verification
rendering.description: Validate Markdown, math, Mermaid, and media rendering directly inside the developer panel.
